# Rahim Patel

Joined Pacific in 2023 as a senior consultant in the data practice. Took on the Globex account in Q3 2024 — the assignment was deliberate, drawing on his prior six years in logistics-analytics roles. Strongest with forecasting models and operations-research style analyses.
